title: U.S. uses hundreds of Tomahawk missiles on Iran, alarming some at Pentagon
summary_full: More than 850 Tomahawks have been fired in just four weeks, people familiar with the matter said, alarming some Pentagon officials because the weapon’s supply is limited.
summary_public: More than 850 Tomahawks have been fired in just four weeks, people familiar with the matter said, alarming some Pentagon officials because the weapon’s supply is limited.

IR.label: negative
